title: Post-Quantum and Quantum Cryptography
summary: Document by the Italian National Cybersecurity Agency (ACN) on post-quantum and quantum cryptography, referencing the NIST PQC standardization process and EU material on the transition to post-quantum cryptography.

title: Europe United in the Urgency of the Transition to Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: ACN announcement on the European joint position on the urgency of transitioning to post-quantum cryptography, with details on the main vulnerabilities and possible precautions to adopt.

title: G7 Cybersecurity Working Group: Priorities Set in Paris
summary: ACN announcement on the G7 Cybersecurity Working Group meeting in Paris, which set priorities including artificial intelligence security, post-quantum cryptography, telecommunications and SME protection.

title: First Italian Quantum Internet Testbed Inaugurated at the University Federico II of Naples
summary: ACN announcement of the inauguration of the first Italian Quantum Internet Testbed at the University Federico II of Naples, citing post-quantum cryptography (PQC) as a means to guarantee the country's resilience.

title: Project Leap 2: Results of the Post-Quantum Cryptography Experimentation in Real Payment Systems
summary: Bank of Italy notice presenting the final report of Project Leap 2, illustrating the results of applying post-quantum cryptography protocols in real payment systems and the main findings.

title: The G7 Cyber Expert Group Publishes the Roadmap for the Financial Sector's Transition to Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: Bank of Italy notice on the publication of the G7 Cyber Expert Group roadmap for the financial sector's transition to post-quantum cryptography, confirming the commitment to a timely and secure transition to quantum-resistant cryptography.

title: Bank of Italy Joins Phase 2 of the BIS Project Leap to Test Post-Quantum Cryptography in Payment Systems
summary: Bank of Italy notice announcing its participation in Phase 2 of the BIS Project Leap, which broadens the experimentation of post-quantum cryptography to payment infrastructures after positive initial-phase results.

title: Steering the Transition to a Quantum-Safe Financial System (Speech by Alessandra Perrazzelli)
summary: Speech by Bank of Italy Deputy Governor Alessandra Perrazzelli on protecting the financial system from quantum-computing threats, outlining the Bank of Italy's proposals in the context of ongoing international work. Hosted on the BIS central bankers' speeches archive.

title: Multi-Year Programme SMD 41/2025 (Defence Acquisition Including Post-Quantum Cryptography)
summary: Italian Senate document on the multi-year acquisition programme SMD 41/2025, which includes post-quantum cryptography (PQC) to protect the digital infrastructures and services of the public administration and other entities.

title: Senate Document CCXVIII No. 3 (National Activities Including Post-Quantum Cryptography)
summary: Report transmitted to the Italian Senate (Doc. CCXVIII no. 3) describing national activities also in the field of post-quantum cryptography and outlining training pathways in applied cryptography.

title: Updated Guidelines on Cryptographic Functions (Post-Quantum Alternatives Included)
summary: ACN announcement (11 June 2026) on the update of its cryptographic functions guidelines, adding new documents on stream ciphers and digital signatures and noting that post-quantum alternatives have already been included for quantum-vulnerable signature schemes, alongside the post-quantum solutions added to the TLS guidelines.

title: Cryptography: ACN Updates the Guidelines (English)
summary: English-language ACN announcement that its cryptographic functions guidelines have been updated to evaluate quantum-resistant solutions, with post-quantum alternatives included for digital signature schemes and aligned to the NIST PQC standards published in August 2024.

title: Transitioning to Post-Quantum Cryptography (Joint Statement, Italian version)
summary: Italian-language version of the joint statement on transitioning to post-quantum cryptography, signed by ACN together with partner cyber agencies, hosted as a PDF on the ACN portal.

title: Italian Strategy for Quantum Technologies Presented to the Council of Ministers
summary: Announcement (31 July 2025) by the Italian Department for Digital Transformation presenting the national Strategy for Quantum Technologies, whose objectives explicitly include safeguarding national security through migration to post-quantum cryptography, in line with EU recommendations and with ACN support.

title: Strategia Italiana per le Tecnologie Quantistiche (Strategy Document)
summary: The official PDF of Italy's national Strategy for Quantum Technologies, which sets the protection of national security through migration to post-quantum cryptography as a strategic objective and frames quantum-resistant data protection as a priority.

title: Parliamentary Inquiry on Quantum Technologies in Defence and Security: Stenographic Record (3 December 2025)
summary: Stenographic record of a Chamber of Deputies Defence Committee inquiry hearing on quantum technologies for defence and security (3 December 2025) that explicitly discusses post-quantum cryptography, noting that only five of the original 48 candidate PQC algorithms have survived.

title: A Practical Implementation of a Quantum-Safe PKI in a Payment Systems Environment
summary: Bank of Italy notice presenting a practical implementation of a quantum-safe public key infrastructure (PKI) in a payment systems environment, applying post-quantum cryptography to payment infrastructure security.

title: The Italian Industrial Ecosystem of Quantum Technologies
summary: Official report by the Italian Ministry of Enterprises and Made in Italy (MIMIT/MISE) mapping Italy's industrial ecosystem for quantum technologies, which explicitly addresses post-quantum cryptography among quantum-security matters for enterprises and critical digital infrastructure.
